title: B-PLOT 1 — Eva on the bike, Papa holds the seat
prompt: Medium tracking shot in @bike_circle, soft afternoon sunlight on the cul-de-sac asphalt. @Eva sits on @eva-bike with both hands on the handlebars, white helmet on head buckled tight, feet on the pedals, nervous-excited smile. @Papa kneels behind the bike, one hand steadying the seat, smiling encouragingly. Papa (warm, gentle): "You ready, sweet pea? I'll hold on tight." Eva (nervous-excited): "OK! OK, I'm ready!" Cheerful encouraging music.
